title: Text, Unicode, Formatting, and Parsing · Program Brief: Python Regex Boundaries
summary: Normalize multilingual community-event records and generate readable confirmations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python regex boundaries increment in a multilingual event text normalizer. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use regular expressions for justified pattern structure while preferring simpler string operations for simple parsing.
Distinguish text from bytes and encode or decode at explicit system boundaries with named error policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
